source: All types of artists quickly took up the cause and started churning out manifestoes of their own . Among other measures , they declared a ten-year moratorium on the nude in paintings . " It was considered the archetypal subject of the Renaissance , and it was not modern , " Poggi says . Umberto Boccioni , a sculptor who had once painted a semi-nude of his own plump and aged mother , went on to create Unique Forms of Continuity in Space ( above ) , a striding , muscular bronze figure that is perhaps the marquee Futurist work .

All types of artists quickly took up the cause and started churning out manifestoes of their own . Among other measures , they declared a ten-year moratorium on the nude in paintings . " It was considered the archetypal subject of the Renaissance , and it was not modern , " Poggi says . Umberto Boccioni , a sculptor who had once painted a semi-nude of his own plump and aged mother , went on to create Unique Forms of Continuity in Space ( above ) , a striding , muscular bronze figure that is perhaps the marquee Futurist work .

source: The elevator opens directly into the seventh-floor suite , penthouse-style . The office walls are an eye-popping shade of neon chartreuse , and San Francisco 's picturesque Nob Hill stretches for blocks outside a large window in the reception area . Workers sit before six state-of-the-art **29;5233;TOOLONG , busily adjusting the palettes and design elements that flash on their 15- and 20-inch screens .

source: I should say something about fans . Compared with science fiction , mysteries barely have a true fandom . Science-fiction fans hold dozens of conventions annually , read everything written in their chosen field and nothing outside it , publish innumerable amateur magazines and newsletters ( " fanzines " ) , and , according to one of the field 's leading editors , are all fifteen-year-old boys who are n't very well socialized .
domestication: 关于粉丝，我得说点什么。跟科幻比起来，悬疑小说几乎没有真正的粉丝群体。科幻迷们一年到头举办几十场大会，只读自己领域的书，其他的一概不碰，还出版了数不清的业余杂志和通讯（“同人志”）。用圈内一位大编辑的话说，这些粉丝都是社交不太好的十五岁男孩。
foreignization: 我应该说说粉丝的事情。与科幻小说相比，推理小说几乎没有真正的粉丝群体。科幻小说的粉丝每年举办数十场聚会，只阅读他们所选领域的一切而不涉猎其他领域，出版无数的业余杂志和通讯（“同人志”），并且根据该领域的一位主要编辑的说法，他们都是十五岁的男孩，社交能力不佳。

source: So there . Mystery solved . An NHL team president , searching for comfy shortcuts , drifts from conventional formality and instead winds up here , sitting in his office on a busy afternoon in mid-February , fielding questions about fashion , explaining that , really , there is no explanation at all .
domestication: 就这样，谜底揭开了。一位NHL球队的总裁，想找找舒服的捷径，结果偏离了常规的正式路线，反而在二月中旬一个忙碌的下午，坐在办公室里回答关于时尚的问题，解释说，其实根本没有什么特别的理由。

source: The biggest complaint about prescription drugs is their cost , even though Americans devote more money to alcohol and almost as much to tobacco . Last year overall pharmaceutical spending increased by 17.4 percent , creating the perception of runaway prices -- and corresponding political pressure for government action .
domestication: 人们对处方药最大的抱怨就是价格太高，尽管美国人花在酒精上的钱更多，花在烟草上的也不少。去年，整体药品支出增长了17.4%，这让人觉得药价涨得没个头，也给政府带来了采取行动的压力。
foreignization: 对处方药的最大抱怨是其成本，即使美国人花在酒精上的钱更多，花在烟草上的钱也差不多。去年整体药物支出增加了17.4%，造成了价格失控的观念——并因此产生了要求政府采取行动的政治压力。

source: That 's right , iron , a.k.a. kryptonite to men . Studies have linked high levels of iron , in excess of 10 milligrams a day , to an increased risk of heart disease in men . But if you 're too good about watching your iron intake and you 're on a low-fat diet that 's light on meat , you could be coming up short . Without enough iron , your body has trouble ferrying oxygen through your bloodstream and dropping it off where you need it most : your brain . " When oxygen is n't reaching the brain , you feel light-headed and tired . Cognitive performance can suffer , too , " says Gary Miller , Ph.D. , a professor of health at Wake Forest University .
domestication: 没错，铁这东西对男人来说就是克ryptonite（氪石）。研究表明，每天摄入超过10毫克的铁，会增加男性患心脏病的风险。但如果你太注意控制铁的摄入，再加上低脂饮食，少吃肉，也可能缺铁。铁少了，身体就难把氧气运送到血液中，并送到最需要的地方——大脑。"大脑缺氧，人就会感到头晕、疲倦，认知能力也会下降，" 温斯顿-塞勒姆大学健康学教授加里·米勒博士说。
foreignization: 那是对的，铁，也就是男性的氪石。研究表明，每天摄入超过10毫克的铁与男性心脏病风险增加有关。但是，如果你过于关注你的铁摄入量，并且你正在遵循一种低脂肪、肉类较少的饮食，你可能会摄入不足。没有足够的铁，你的身体难以将氧气通过血液输送并送到最需要的地方：你的大脑。“当大脑得不到足够的氧气时，你会感到头晕和疲倦。认知表现也会受到影响，”Wake Forest大学健康学教授Gary Miller博士说。

Without enough iron , your body has trouble ferrying oxygen through your bloodstream and dropping it off where you need it most : your brain . " When oxygen is n't reaching the brain , you feel light-headed and tired . Cognitive performance can suffer , too , " says Gary Miller , Ph.D. , a professor of health at Wake Forest University .

source: IN THE MODERN imagination , the medieval knight is a glamorous figure . No other warrior in Western history seems so admirable , so devoted to causes beyond the nasty realities of the battlefield . Dressed in shining armor , astride a magnificent horse , he carries his lady 's favor and embodies a chivalric ideal that to this day suggests courtesy and high-mindedness . His life , it seems , was surrounded by ritual : colorful tournaments at which he honed his skills , religious ceremonies that endowed his mundane pursuits with an aura of divine justification .
domestication: 在现代人的想象中，中世纪的骑士是个光彩夺目的人物。西方历史上没有哪个战士能像他这样令人敬仰，如此一心向善，超脱战场上的残酷现实。身披闪亮盔甲，骑着高头大马，带着心上人的信物，骑士的形象至今仍代表着礼仪与高尚。他的生活似乎充满了仪式感：色彩斑斓的比武场上，他磨炼技艺；宗教仪式则赋予他平凡追求以神圣的正当性。
foreignization: 在现代的想象中，中世纪的骑士是一个迷人的形象。西方历史上没有其他战士显得如此令人钦佩，如此献身于超越战场残酷现实的事业。身穿闪亮的盔甲，骑着一匹壮丽的战马，他携带着女士的青睐，体现了骑士精神的理想，这种理想至今仍代表着礼貌和高尚。他的生活似乎被仪式所围绕：他磨练技能的多彩比武大会，赋予他世俗追求以神圣正当性的宗教仪式。

source: Tales of wholesale vandalism also come from Estonia . Journalists recently visiting the large submarine base at Paldiski reported scuttled warships and bizarre attempts to burn buoys and docks . It will cost Estonia huge sums simply to clean up the Paldiski harbor and to ascertain that no radioactive , toxic , or explosive materials have been dumped there . The demolition apparently started just weeks after Russia indicated to Estonia that it wanted to keep Paldiski as a strategic base even after other forces were withdrawn .
domestication: 爱沙尼亚也传来了大规模破坏的消息。最近，记者探访了帕尔迪斯基的大潜艇基地，发现有战舰被凿沉，还有人尝试烧毁浮标和码头，真是匪夷所思。爱沙尼亚要清理帕尔迪斯基港，还要查清楚有没有放射性、有毒或爆炸物被丢弃在那里，这得花一大笔钱。据说，这些破坏行为是在俄罗斯暗示爱沙尼亚希望在撤出其他部队后仍保留帕尔迪斯基作为战略基地的几周后开始的。

source: More government money is spent studying this disease than other major cancers , although far less than is spent on AIDS . As with AIDS , for years politicians ignored this rising epidemic . But taking their cue from AIDS activists , increasingly vocal breast-cancer groups have turned their anger on Congress and on state legislatures . They , in turn , have funneled more resources into research on treatment and cure .

source: The upshot of the meeting was another good news/bad news scenario . On the positive side , 701 Sutter was in " line of sight " of not one but two WinStar transmitters , which meant that the building had two separate access points into WinStar 's network . On the downside , Davey 's building was far too small for WinStar to consider wiring on its own dime , since the way the company recoups the cost of its free equipment installation is through acquiring new onsite customers for its services . " Typically , WinStar targets buildings that have at least 60,000 to 100,000 square feet , " says Davey . " Mine is only 20,000 total . "
domestication: 会议的结果又是一个好坏参半的局面。好的一面是，701苏特街不仅在一个WinStar发射器的“视线”范围内，而是在两个发射器的“视线”内，这意味着大楼有两个独立的接入点可以连接到WinStar的网络。不好的一面是，戴维的大楼太小了，WinStar不愿意自掏腰包去布线，因为公司通过安装免费设备来收回成本的方式，就是吸引新客户使用他们的服务。戴维说：“通常情况下，WinStar会瞄准有6万到10万平方米的建筑。”“我的只有2万平方米，根本不达标。”
foreignization: 会议的结果又是另一个好消息/坏消息的情况。在积极的一面，701斯图特街处于不仅一个而是两个WinStar发射器的“视线”范围内，这意味着该建筑有两个独立的接入点进入WinStar的网络。在消极的一面，戴维的建筑太小，WinStar不会考虑自费为其布线，因为该公司通过为其服务获取新的现场客户来收回其免费设备安装的成本。“通常，WinStar的目标是至少有60,000到100,000平方英尺的建筑，”戴维说。“我的总共只有20,000平方英尺。”

source: An abnormally high level of iron in the body is associated with prostate cancer , and researchers from the Cancer Science Institute of Singapore ( CSI Singapore ) at the National University of Singapore may have uncovered the mechanism to explain this link . They have found the role of the iron storage gene , FTH1 , and its pseudogenes in regulating iron levels in cells and slowing down prostate cancer growth . The new findings could pave the way for future developments in prostate cancer diagnostics and therapeutics .
domestication: 体内铁含量异常高与前列腺癌有关，新加坡国立大学癌症科学研究所的研究人员可能揭示了这种关联的机制。他们发现了铁储存基因FTH1及其假基因在调节细胞中铁水平和抑制前列腺癌生长中的作用。这些新发现可能为前列腺癌的诊断和治疗开辟新的道路。

source: Consider Cuts , a 30-minute fitness franchise for men that recently launched Cuts Women . Many Cuts Women customers are former Curves members who are sold on the idea of a 30-minute workout but are bored with Curves ' routine and want something more intense , says John Gennaro , founder of the franchise , Which is based in Clark , New Jersey . With 90 locations and 15,000 members , Cuts is puny compared with Curves . But that does n't bother Gennaro . He 's happy to let Curves educate women about 30-minute fitness -- and even happier to provide an alternative when they grow restless .
domestication: 考虑一下Cuts，这是一家面向男性的30分钟健身连锁店，最近推出了女性版的Cuts Women。很多Cuts Women的顾客以前都是Curves的会员，她们喜欢30分钟的健身理念，但对Curves的老一套感到厌倦，想找点更刺激的。Cuts的创始人约翰·杰纳罗说，他来自新泽西州的克拉克。尽管Cuts有90个门店和15000名会员，在规模上还比不上Curves，但这并不让杰纳罗担心。他乐见其成，让Curves去普及30分钟健身的概念，等女性会员们觉得腻了，自然就会找上门来。

source: Be patient in your puppy pursuit . I was . I spent more than a year researching different breeds , visiting shelters and breeders , and discussing the pros and cons of my " finalists " with veterinarians and animal behaviorists . " Investing time doing your homework before you adopt a puppy can pay off in the long ran , " says Rolan Tripp , DVM , a veterinarian who operates AnimalBehavior.Net , an online source of information on pet selection and animal behavior . " You ' re much more likely to find a dog that ideally fits into your lifestyle . " For a link to Dr. Tripp 's Web site , visit www.prevention.com/links Just Right for You
domestication: 追小狗要有点耐心，我就是这么做的。我花了一年多的时间研究不同品种的狗狗，拜访了收容所和繁殖者，还和兽医及动物行为学家讨论了我的“最终候选”品种的优缺点。“在领养小狗前花时间做足功课，长远来看会有回报。”经营AnimalBehavior.Net网站的兽医罗兰·特里普博士说，这个网站提供宠物选择和动物行为方面的信息。“这样你找到的狗狗更有可能完美融入你的生活。”想访问特里普博士的网站，可以去www.prevention.com/links看看，那里有适合你的内容。

source: According to the latest Economist/YouGov survey , Trump is winning just 23 percent of the Hispanic vote -- 4 points behind Romney -- 37 percent of the female vote -- 7 points behind Romney -- and 3 percent of the black vote ( Romney won only 6 percent in a contest against the country 's first black president , while President George W. Bush captured 11 percent of the black vote in his 2004 re-election ) .  RELATED CONTENT
domestication: 根据最新的《经济学人》/YouGov民调，特朗普在拉美裔选民中只赢得了23%的支持，比罗姆尼少了4个百分点；在女性选民中获得了37%的支持，落后罗姆尼7个百分点；而在非裔选民中的支持率更是只有3%，罗姆尼当年面对美国首位黑人总统时还赢得了6%的非裔选票，而小布什总统在2004年连任时则拿下了11%的非裔选票。相关报道

source: The financing was the biggest unknown going into it . I talked to a couple of colleagues and friends who had previously purchased to get a sense of which mortgage lenders to use . Looking back on it , I should have done a whole lot more research . I knew I was in a low-rate environment , that my credit score was really good . That 's pretty much all I knew . I worked with a really great mortgage broker and ultimately I ended up going with a 10-year adjustable-rate mortgage . The post-crisis consumer financial protections made me feel really comfortable with an ARM . This was not my forever home . I would use it as an investment or a stepping stone . The rate is maxed at 2.125% . Yeah , it 's a REALLY good interest rate .
domestication: 融资问题是最大的未知数。我找了几位同事和朋友，他们之前买过房，想问问用哪些房贷机构比较好。现在回想起来，我真应该多做点研究。当时我知道利率低，自己的信用分也很好，也就了解这么多。后来我找了一位很不错的房贷经纪人合作，最终选了一个十年的可调利率贷款。金融危机后的消费者金融保护措施让我对这种可调利率贷款很放心。这房子不是打算住一辈子的，要么当投资，要么当跳板。利率上限是2.125%，真的是非常低的利率了。
foreignization: 融资是最大的未知数。我与几位之前购买过房产的同事和朋友交谈，了解该使用哪些抵押贷款机构。回想起来，我应该做更多的研究。我知道自己处于低利率环境，我的信用评分非常好。这基本上就是我所知道的一切。我与一位非常出色的抵押贷款经纪人合作，最终选择了10年期可调利率抵押贷款。危机后的消费者金融保护措施让我对选择可调利率抵押贷款感到非常安心。这并不是我的永久住所。我会将其作为投资或跳板。利率最高为2.125%。是的，这是一个非常优惠的利率。

source: Panama also found itself on the Plowshare target list . The 50-year-old Panama Canal had proven too small for the supertankers of the day . The U.S. wanted to build a new waterway though Panama 's Darin province ; nothing short of a nuclear blast could cut through the flooded rain forests and 1,000-foot-high mountains .
domestication: 巴拿马也成了“犁头”计划的目标。当时已经50岁的巴拿马运河，对巨型油轮来说太窄了。美国想在巴拿马的达连省建一条新航道；若想穿透那片水淹的雨林和高达千尺的山脉，非得用核爆不可。

source: L : OBSERVE THE MOON Woodcock fly mostly at night , so the moon may serve as a navigational tool . Data show that autumn woodcock movement increases with a gibbous ( more than 50 percent lit ) moon . A waxing moon -- one moving toward full -- seems to induce greater woodcock movement than a waning moon .
domestication: 观月：鹬主要在夜间飞行，所以月亮可能作为它们的导航工具。数据显示，秋季鹬的活动随着盈凸月（即超过一半亮面的月亮）而增加。一个正在盈的月亮，也就是逐渐变圆的月亮，似乎比正在亏的月亮更能促使鹬的活动。
foreignization: L : 观察月亮 鹁鸪主要在夜间飞行，因此月亮可能作为导航工具。数据显示，秋天的鹁鸪迁徙活动随着凸月（超过50％被照亮）而增加。一个盈月——即向满月过渡的月亮——似乎比亏月更能诱发更多的鹁鸪迁徙活动。

L : 观察月亮 鹁鸪主要在夜间飞行，因此月亮可能作为导航工具。数据显示，秋天的鹁鸪迁徙活动随着凸月（超过50％被照亮）而增加。一个盈月——即向满月过渡的月亮——似乎比亏月更能诱发更多的鹁鸪迁徙活动。

source: Ballet increases flexibility from head to toe more than other dance styles . And the focus on posture will have you standing taller and moving more gracefully even off the dance floor . source: The Moche were agriculturalists . They grew a wide variety of crops , including corn , beans , guava , avocados , squash , chiles , and peanuts . From the Pacific Ocean , as well as from rivers , marshes , and lagoons , they harvested a rich catch of fish , shrimp , crabs , crayfish , and mollusks . Domesticated llamas , guinea pigs , and ducks were additional sources of food , along with land mammals , birds , snails , and wild plants , which were occasionally hunted or gathered .
domestication: 莫切人是农耕高手，种的作物五花八门，玉米、豆子、番石榴、牛油果、南瓜、辣椒和花生应有尽有。他们不仅在太平洋里捞鱼摸虾，河里、沼泽和泻湖里的鱼虾蟹、龙虾和贝类也是他们的盘中餐。家养的骆驼、豚鼠和鸭子提供了额外的食物来源，偶尔也会捕猎一些陆地上的野兽、鸟儿、蜗牛，或者采集些野生植物来补充伙食。
foreignization: 莫切人是农业民族。他们种植了多种作物，包括玉米、豆类、番石榴、鳄梨、南瓜、辣椒和花生。他们从太平洋以及河流、沼泽和泻湖中捕获了丰富的鱼类、虾、蟹、龙虾和贝类。驯养的骆驼、豚鼠和鸭子是额外的食物来源，除此之外，还有陆地哺乳动物、鸟类、蜗牛和野生植物，这些偶尔也会被猎杀或采集。

source: The researchers used eye-tracking techniques to record where people spent the most time gazing at each image , whether it was on areas of the image that were more negative -- such as the faces of those in suffering -- or on less emotionally charged parts of the image . They also compared this to how much time each participant looked at the socially relevant areas of neutral images , like the face of a person walking down the street .
domestication: 研究人员用眼动追踪技术记录了人们在每张图片上最常注视的地方，看他们是不是更多地盯着负面区域，比如受苦者的脸，而不是那些情感色彩较淡的部分。他们还把这些数据跟参与者看中性图片时的视线进行了对比，比如走在街上的路人脸庞。
foreignization: 研究人员使用眼动追踪技术记录人们在每张图像上注视时间最长的区域，无论是图像中更为负面的部分——比如那些受苦者的面部——还是图像中情感色彩较弱的部分。他们还将此与每个参与者注视中性图像中社会相关区域的时间进行了比较，例如街上行人的面部。

source: The reason for this sudden interest in Tribune , and potentially a wave of further purchases , stems from a decision made on April 20th by Trump 's FCC chief , Ajit Pai . If you 're unaware , the rules around media ownership say that you ca n't own stations that reach more than 39 percent of US households . The rule is designed to prevent one company from gaining undue influence over the flow of information to people .
domestication: 对《论坛报》突然感兴趣，甚至可能引发一波收购潮的原因，源自特朗普的FCC主席阿吉特·派4月20日做出的一项决定。你可能不知道，媒体所有权的规则规定，任何一家公司拥有的电视台覆盖的美国家庭不能超过39%。这条规矩是为了防止某个公司对信息流动的控制过大，影响太大。
foreignization: 这种对《论坛报》突然产生的兴趣，以及可能随之而来的购买热潮，源于特朗普的FCC主席阿吉特·派在4月20日作出的一项决定。如果你不清楚，媒体所有权规则规定，你不能拥有能够触及超过39%美国家庭的电视台。这一规则旨在防止一家公司对信息流向民众产生不正当的影响力。

source: Dangle he did , and WinStar at last saw the light . By May 1998 , 701 Sutter Street had a fully functioning T1 connection wired to the desktop , at no cost to the tenants or the owners . And in confirmation of Davey 's initial vision the previous fall , everyone involved has come out ahead . WinStar has won several contracts from Davey 's leads . Albion Pacific sold 701 Sutter Street at a profit , with the provision that all existing lease agreements remain intact . And Andrew Meieran is using the 995 Market Street site as the showpiece of what he hopes will be a lucrative chain of " smart " wired properties in both the Bay Area and Southern California .
domestication: 他终于吊到了鱼，WinStar 终于见到了曙光。到了1998年5月，701苏特街的每个办公桌上都接上了T1线路，而且完全免费，无论是对租户还是业主来说都是如此。这正好验证了戴维去年秋天的初步设想，所有参与者都得到了好处。WinStar 通过戴维提供的线索赢得了好几份合同。阿尔比恩太平洋公司以盈利出售了701苏特街，还附带了一项条件，即所有现有租赁协议保持不变。而安德鲁·梅耶兰则把995市场街作为样板工程，希望能以此在旧金山湾区和南加州打造一条有利可图的“智能”联网物业链。
foreignization: 他确实吊足了胃口，最终WinStar看到了曙光。到1998年5月，701萨特街已经安装了一个完全运作的T1连接，直达桌面，租户和业主无需支付任何费用。事实证明，戴维去年秋天的初步设想是正确的，所有相关方都取得了进展。WinStar根据戴维提供的线索赢得了几个合同。Albion Pacific以盈利的方式出售了701萨特街，并规定所有现有的租赁协议保持不变。安德鲁·梅里安正在将995市场街作为展示项目，希望这将成为他在旧金山湾区和南加州打造的一系列“智能”联网物业中的第一个盈利项目。

Albion Pacific sold 701 Sutter Street at a profit , with the provision that all existing lease agreements remain intact . And Andrew Meieran is using the 995 Market Street site as the showpiece of what he hopes will be a lucrative chain of " smart " wired properties in both the Bay Area and Southern California .

source: Almost half of the respondents to the Hall of Fame survey said they had stuck to their company 's original mission , through thick and thin . source: Franklin Lischke- the freckle-faced lad in the middledid n't have to go far out of his way to pose for this picture . His father owned the building in New Rochelle that the artist used as a studio . If the boy was n't modeling , Norman found other duties for Franklin . Over time , his interest in Rockwell 's work grew , inspiring him to study art and make it his career . Franklin eventually became an established commercial artist in New York City specializing in fashion illustration for stores like Bloomingdale 's and Saks . I had an opportunity to interview a much older Franklin at length . He recalled how Rockwell always encouraged models to share feedback about his paintings .
domestication: 弗兰克林·利什克，这个满脸雀斑的小伙子，拍照时根本不用费劲走远路。他爸爸在纽罗谢尔拥有一栋楼，画家就在这栋楼里设了自己的工作室。如果弗兰克林不摆姿势当模特，诺曼也会给他找其他活干。时间一长，他对洛克威尔的作品越来越感兴趣，这激励他去学艺术，并把它当作自己的职业。后来，弗兰克林成了纽约市一位知名的商业艺术家，专为布鲁明代尔和萨克斯这样的商店做时装插画。我有幸详细地采访了年长许多的弗兰克林。他回忆说，洛克威尔总是鼓励模特们对他的画提出意见。

source: The SuperSix 's smooth , understated power is the result of Cannondale 's careful rider-focused design . Although the 2012 women 's model shares DNA with the frame ridden to multiple victories last year by Team Liquigas/Cannondale , the company insists that my version is no clone . True to its gender-specific product philosophy , Cannondale 's intention is to offer women " a unique geometry and thoughtful component choices , " says women 's product manager Lyriel Jordan .
domestication: SuperSix 的动力平顺而内敛，这都得益于 Cannondale 精心设计、以骑手为中心的成果。虽然 2012 年的女士款与去年 Team Liquigas/Cannondale 夺冠时所用的车架有相似之处，但公司坚称我这款可不是简单的复制版。Cannondale 一向坚持性别专属的产品理念，女性产品经理 Lyriel Jordan 表示，他们希望为女性提供“独特的几何结构和精心挑选的配件”。

source: It 's not easy being a progressive education reformer in the age of President Trump . Speaking for myself only , I support high-quality public charter schools but I oppose vouchers . And even progressive voucher supporters want choice accompanied by real accountability , which does not appear to be part of this administration 's agenda .

source: I think that the hardest part of the transition , apart from loneliness and not being able to flit off on a whim , was adjusting to the short winter days . In the past , it had been so easy to flick a switch , but here we had no electricity . And when the days finally stretched and warmed , and I could peel off my winter clothes , I was attacked by every size and shape of insect imaginable . When it comes to wilderness living , if anything can knock someone from an idealist to a realist in 10 minutes flat , it is the bugs .
domestication: 我觉得最难的适应过程，除了孤独和不能随心所欲地到处走走之外，就是冬天那短短的白昼了。过去随手一开灯，问题就解决了，可这里连电都没有。等到了天终于变长变暖，脱下厚厚的冬衣时，各种各样的虫子就来“欢迎”我了。说到野外生活，要是有什么能在十分钟内让一个理想主义者变成现实主义者的话，那非这些虫子莫属了。
foreignization: 我认为过渡中最困难的部分，除了孤独和不能随心所欲地四处走动之外，就是适应短暂的冬日。在过去，开个开关就很容易解决，但在这里我们没有电。当日子终于变长变暖，我可以脱掉冬衣时，我却被各种形状和大小的昆虫攻击了。说到荒野生活，如果有什么能在10分钟内让一个理想主义者变成现实主义者的话，那就是虫子了。

I think that the hardest part of the transition , apart from loneliness and not being able to flit off on a whim , was adjusting to the short winter days . And when the days finally stretched and warmed , and I could peel off my winter clothes , I was attacked by every size and shape of insect imaginable . When it comes to wilderness living , if anything can knock someone from an idealist to a realist in 10 minutes flat , it is the bugs .

PRESIDENT CARTER GOT UP THIS morning around eight , watched SportsCenter and worked out in the gym at his place in New Jersey with a personal trainer , then slid into his Mercedes Maybach and let his longtime driver Romero take him over the George Washington Bridge and into Manhattan to the Universal building at Eighth Avenue and Fiftieth Street .
卡特总统今天早上大约八点起床，观看了《体育中心》，然后在他的新泽西住所与私人教练在健身房锻炼，之后滑入了他的梅赛德斯迈巴赫，并让他的长期司机罗梅罗带他穿过乔治·华盛顿大桥，进入曼哈顿的第八大道和第五十街的环球大楼。

" Vegetable Soup , for example , is part of a series of long , horizontal paintings she calls " tablescapes , " which she intends to be viewed more like landscapes than like traditional still lifes .

source: The ambulance business was n't even on Verrochi 's radar screen in the fall of 1991 , when he and Puopolo leased office space in Boston and cast about for a new consolidation candidate . When their banker suggested ambulances , Verrochi was intrigued . " I discovered there were 2,200 private companies in the field , mostly mom-and-pop operations , " he says . " Some had consolidated regionally , but nobody had gone public , and venture capitalists were nowhere in sight , so it had n't been picked over . It was undiscovered , which made it perfect for us . "
domestication: 1991年秋天，维罗奇和普波洛在波士顿租了办公室，开始四处寻找可以整合的项目，那时候他们压根儿没想过救护车这行。是他们的银行家提议说，不妨考虑一下救护车业务，这下子维罗奇来了兴趣。“我一查才发现，这个行业里有2200家私营公司，大部分都是夫妻店。”他说，“有些公司在地区上已经有所整合，但还没人上市，风险投资也完全没有涉足，所以这行业还没有被充分开发。我们算是发现了新大陆，太适合我们了。”
foreignization: 1991年秋天，当Verrochi和Puopolo在波士顿租赁了办公空间并寻找新的整合目标时，救护车业务甚至没有进入他们的视野。当他们的银行家建议关注救护车行业时，Verrochi感到很感兴趣。“我发现在这个领域有2200家私营公司，大部分是夫妻店，”他说。“有些公司在地区上进行了整合，但没有人上市，风险投资者也完全没有涉足，所以这个行业还没有被充分挖掘。这是一个未被发现的领域，对我们来说非常完美。”

The ambulance business was n't even on Verrochi 's radar screen in the fall of 1991 , when he and Puopolo leased office space in Boston and cast about for a new consolidation candidate . When their banker suggested ambulances , Verrochi was intrigued . " I discovered there were 2,200 private companies in the field , mostly mom-and-pop operations , " he says . " Some had consolidated regionally , but nobody had gone public , and venture capitalists were nowhere in sight , so it had n't been picked over . It was undiscovered , which made it perfect for us . "

source: Lecount Davis , a certified financial planner and president of Washington , D.C.-based Financial Services Network , tells of a client whose wife left him with a mountain of bills . The small businessman could n't take care of personal and business bills , so he took to the shelter of the bankruptcy court .
domestication: 莱康特·戴维斯是一名注册金融规划师，也是华盛顿特区金融服务网络公司的总裁。他讲了一个客户的故事，这个客户的妻子离开了他，留下了一大堆账单。这位小商人既得管个人的账单，又得应付生意上的开销，实在是无力承担，最后只好求助于破产法庭，寻求庇护。

source: Discovery will be the first Trek series for whom the main character wo n't be the ship 's captain . Of course , it is also possible that Yeoh could be playing the Captain of the Discovery , which would make here the first female Captain on a Star Trek series since Voyager ended back in 2001 . In any event , Yeoh will be the first Asian lead in a Star Trek show .

source: As for sports , she says , " Recently when we telecast the World Soccer Cup matches live from Italy , in addition to our studio staff in Laguna Niguel , California , we had special reporters on the scene in Europe . Each telecast had an average audience rating of 38 . At times we reached peaks of 51 . If you consider that an audience rating of 51 represents 3,500,000 households , I do n't see how you can call that anything but success . "
domestication: 说到体育，她说道：“最近我们从意大利现场直播了世界杯足球赛，除了在加利福尼亚拉古纳尼格尔的演播室团队，我们在欧洲还派出了特约记者。每次直播的平均收视率都达到了38。有时候甚至能冲到51。要知道，51的收视率意味着350万户家庭在观看，这还能不叫成功吗？”
foreignization: 至于体育，她说：“最近我们从意大利现场直播了世界杯足球赛，除了位于加利福尼亚拉古纳尼格尔的演播室工作人员外，我们在欧洲还有特别记者。每次转播的平均收视率为38。有时我们达到了51的峰值。如果考虑到51的收视率代表3,500,000户家庭，我实在看不出这能称为什么而不是成功。”

source: Unfortunately , we have quite different things on our minds when we talk with our representatives than when we shop for a new car . A " sensible " car that got fuel economy , was safe , had low emissions , and low operating costs would not compete well with the luxury or muscle cars . While sensible , it would be more expensive than the economy cars . The higher price tag would mean that some people could no longer afford the car . Insisting on safety and other socially desirable characteristics has the effect of denying cars to would-be purchasers with the lowest income .
domestication: 遗憾的是，我们和代表交谈时考虑的事情，和我们去买新车时想的完全不同。一款“明智”的车，省油、安全、排放低、维护成本也低，但这样的车却卖不过豪华车或肌肉车。虽然很合理，但它的价格比经济型车贵。价格高了，就意味着有些人就买不起了。坚持要安全和其他对社会有益的特点，结果就是收入最低的潜在买家反而买不到车了。
foreignization: 不幸的是，当我们与我们的代表交谈时，我们所考虑的事情与我们购买新车时所考虑的相当不同。一款“明智”的汽车，燃油经济性好、安全、排放低、运营成本低，将无法与豪华车或肌肉车竞争。尽管很合理，但它的价格会比经济型车更高。更高的价格标签意味着一些人将无法负担这辆车。坚持安全和其他社会期望的特性实际上剥夺了低收入潜在购买者购车的机会。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Unfortunately , we have quite different things on our minds when we talk with our representatives than when we shop for a new car . A " sensible " car that got fuel economy , was safe , had low emissions , and low operating costs would not compete well with the luxury or muscle cars . While sensible , it would be more expensive than the economy cars . The higher price tag would mean that some people could no longer afford the car . Insisting on safety and other socially desirable characteristics has the effect of denying cars to would-be purchasers with the lowest income .
遗憾的是，我们和代表交谈时考虑的事情，和我们去买新车时想的完全不同。一款“明智”的车，省油、安全、排放低、维护成本也低，但这样的车却卖不过豪华车或肌肉车。虽然很合理，但它的价格比经济型车贵。价格高了，就意味着有些人就买不起了。坚持要安全和其他对社会有益的特点，结果就是收入最低的潜在买家反而买不到车了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Unfortunately , we have quite different things on our minds when we talk with our representatives than when we shop for a new car . A " sensible " car that got fuel economy , was safe , had low emissions , and low operating costs would not compete well with the luxury or muscle cars . While sensible , it would be more expensive than the economy cars . The higher price tag would mean that some people could no longer afford the car . Insisting on safety and other socially desirable characteristics has the effect of denying cars to would-be purchasers with the lowest income .
不幸的是，当我们与我们的代表交谈时，我们所考虑的事情与我们购买新车时所考虑的相当不同。一款“明智”的汽车，燃油经济性好、安全、排放低、运营成本低，将无法与豪华车或肌肉车竞争。尽管很合理，但它的价格会比经济型车更高。更高的价格标签意味着一些人将无法负担这辆车。坚持安全和其他社会期望的特性实际上剥夺了低收入潜在购买者购车的机会。

source: The social-interest groups that backed the Republicans have also gotten a little of what they wanted . The Christian right did n't nail down school prayer , but it has won some anti-abortion legislation . The NRA got hearings on Waco to divert public attention after the Oklahoma City bombing spotlighted the NRA 's incendiary rhetoric . And the property rights organizations have been cheered by " takings " legislation that is really designed to help out the timber industry . Meanwhile , the House Republicans have spurned those individuals and movements that favored political reform -- that wanted to loosen the grip of the special interests . Term limits legislation , now a threat to Republican rule , was defeated in the House . Campaign finance reform has been repeatedly put off .
domestication: 支持共和党的利益团体也得到了一些他们想要的东西。基督教右派虽然没能把祷告带进学校，但也赢得了一些反堕胎的法律。全国步枪协会在俄克拉荷马城爆炸案后，借瓦科事件的听证会转移了公众的注意力，摆脱了他们的煽动言论。还有那些财产权组织，看到“征用”法案的出台，也是乐开了花，这实际上是帮了木材行业的忙。与此同时，众议院的共和党人却对那些主张政治改革、希望削弱特殊利益集团势力的人和运动不屑一顾。限制任期的法案，现在成了威胁共和党统治地位的一颗定时炸弹，被众议院否决了。竞选资金改革也被一拖再拖。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The social-interest groups that backed the Republicans have also gotten a little of what they wanted . The Christian right did n't nail down school prayer , but it has won some anti-abortion legislation . The NRA got hearings on Waco to divert public attention after the Oklahoma City bombing spotlighted the NRA 's incendiary rhetoric . And the property rights organizations have been cheered by " takings " legislation that is really designed to help out the timber industry . Meanwhile , the House Republicans have spurned those individuals and movements that favored political reform -- that wanted to loosen the grip of the special interests . Term limits legislation , now a threat to Republican rule , was defeated in the House . Campaign finance reform has been repeatedly put off .

source: TIM PETERS , like Glenn Drowns , became a plant breeder in high school . Glenn , however , had the good fortune to start with a vegetable that is easy to work with . Tim began with broccoli , a plant breeder 's nightmare . And while Glenn seems to have been born a gardener , Tim had it thrust upon him .

source: Holmes 's belief in society 's right to try out new forms of self-regulation followed from his belief , shared by all pragmatists , in the virtues of experimentation . If we learn by doing , we have to keep doing new things , since that is how knowledge progresses or at least adapts . This was the rationale for Holmes 's most celebrated opinion as a judge , his dissent in Abrams v. U.S. ( 1919 ) , in which he rejected state efforts to punish political opinion as a foreclosing of social possibilities . Even the Constitution , he said , " is an experiment , as all life is an experiment . Every year if not every day we have to wager our salvation upon some prophecy based upon imperfect knowledge . While that experiment is part of our system I think that we should be eternally vigilant against attempts to check the expression of opinions that we loathe and believe to be fraught with death . "
domestication: 霍姆斯相信社会有权尝试新的自我调节形式，这源自他与所有实用主义者共同持有的信念，即实验的美德。既然我们是通过实践来学习的，就必须不断尝试新事物，因为这是知识进步或至少适应的方式。这种理念体现在霍姆斯作为法官最著名的判决意见中，即他在1919年的阿布拉姆斯诉美国案中的异议。在该案中，他反对国家惩罚政治观点的做法，认为这会限制社会发展的可能性。他说，“宪法本身也是一种实验，就像生命中的所有事情一样都是实验。每年，甚至每天，我们都得用不完善的知识做预测，赌上我们的未来。既然这种实验是我们制度的一部分，我认为我们应该时刻警惕那些试图阻止表达我们厌恶、认为有致命危险的意见的行为。”
foreignization: 霍姆斯相信社会有权利尝试新的自我调节形式，这源自他与所有实用主义者共同持有的实验美德的信念。如果我们通过行动来学习，那么我们必须不断尝试新事物，因为这是知识进步或至少适应的方式。这就是霍姆斯作为法官最著名的意见的理据，即他在艾布拉姆斯诉美国案（1919年）中的异议，他在该案中拒绝了国家试图惩罚政治观点的做法，认为这是对社会可能性的封闭。他甚至说，“宪法也是一种实验，就像所有生命都是实验一样。每年，如果不是每天，我们都要基于不完美的知识对我们自己的拯救下注。只要这种实验是我们制度的一部分，我认为我们应该永远警惕那些试图阻止表达我们厌恶并认为会带来死亡的观点的企图。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Holmes 's belief in society 's right to try out new forms of self-regulation followed from his belief , shared by all pragmatists , in the virtues of experimentation . If we learn by doing , we have to keep doing new things , since that is how knowledge progresses or at least adapts . This was the rationale for Holmes 's most celebrated opinion as a judge , his dissent in Abrams v. U.S. ( 1919 ) , in which he rejected state efforts to punish political opinion as a foreclosing of social possibilities . Even the Constitution , he said , " is an experiment , as all life is an experiment . Every year if not every day we have to wager our salvation upon some prophecy based upon imperfect knowledge . While that experiment is part of our system I think that we should be eternally vigilant against attempts to check the expression of opinions that we loathe and believe to be fraught with death . "

source: Now , though , Huntington-Whiteley has ascended to a level of celebrity where she can model ironically . At parties , she 's been known to rock a runway walk or two . " There 's always a moment when some great song comes on and everyone 's like , ' Do the runway walk , Rosie ! ' And you 're like , ' No , no , no , ' and then you begrudgingly get up and do your thing . " But maybe she secretly loves it . " Yeah , it might be my little party trick . It always gets applause . "

source: James : And that way ... madness lies , I guess is the blunt way to put that . But absolutely -- this is a conflict that is less about immediate sparks flying and more how it 's a powder keg that 's been conveniently placed around other sparks for now . Could it blow up in Sansa , Dany , and everyone else 's faces ? Could the sparks fly elsewhere ? We 'll have to wait and see . But as the season continues , I 'm very interested to see these two characters come together more directly .

source: But Trump did n't want Grady ; he wanted Kevin McAleenan , commissioner of Customs and Border Protection . It 's easy to see why . Under McAleenan 's leadership , CBP repeatedly broke the law to implement Trump 's first travel ban , earning a rebuke from DHS ' Office of Inspector General . McAleenan is a strong proponent of a border wall as well as new laws to curb asylum-seekers ' entry into the country . He infamously failed to inform Congress that a 7-year-old girl died in CBP custody when he testified before the Senate just three days after her death .
domestication: 但特朗普看不上格雷迪，他想要的是海关和边境保护局的局长凯文·麦卡利南。这不难理解。在麦卡利南的领导下，CBP为了执行特朗普的第一个旅行禁令，多次违法，还被国土安全部的监察长批评了一顿。麦卡利南可是边境墙的坚定支持者，还力推新法律限制寻求庇护者入境。最出名的一次是他没告诉国会，有个7岁的小女孩在CBP的监管下去世了，这事发生在他在参议院作证前的三天。
foreignization: 但特朗普不想要格雷迪；他想要海关和边境保护局局长凯文·麦卡利南。这很容易理解。在麦卡利南的领导下，海关和边境保护局多次违法实施特朗普的第一个旅行禁令，因此遭到国土安全部监察长的谴责。麦卡利南也是边境墙和新的限制寻求庇护者入境法律的强烈支持者。他在参议院作证时臭名昭著地没有告知国会，一名7岁女孩在其机构监护下死亡，而这发生在她死亡后的三天内。

source: Shelby Tilford , director of NASAs earth sciences division , says a French-Russian satellite scheduled for launch this year or next will carry an instrument capable of monitoring variations in solar brightness . But it is not clear how well this instrument will work or whether the satellite will last beyond a few years . Because of funding limitations , the United States has no plans for launching any such instrument in the 1990s . According to Tilford , " There is a good possibility that there will be a data gap in solar measurements . But that is only one of many data gaps . "
domestication: 谢尔比·蒂尔福德，美国宇航局地球科学部门的主任，说今年或明年将发射一颗法国和俄罗斯合作的卫星，这颗卫星上会携带一种能监测太阳亮度变化的仪器。但目前还不清楚这个仪器究竟能不能好使，也不知道这颗卫星能不能撑过几年。因为经费有限，美国在90年代并没有发射类似仪器的计划。蒂尔福德表示：“太阳测量数据可能会出现断档，但这只是众多数据断档中的一个罢了。”
foreignization: 谢尔比·蒂尔福德，NASA地球科学部门的主任，说一颗计划在今年或明年发射的法俄卫星将携带一种能够监测太阳亮度变化的仪器。但目前尚不清楚这台仪器的效果如何，或者这颗卫星能否持续工作数年。由于资金限制，美国在90年代没有发射此类仪器的计划。蒂尔福德说，“很有可能会出现太阳测量数据的空白期。但这只是众多数据空白之一。”

source: You 've been more patient than most people would have been in your situation . Your wife 's initial reason to go back to her home country was a legitimate one , but to stay there in order to start dental school seems cruel and unusual . It must have been difficult to comprehend how the same woman you married could be so callous as to leave you after two days and only come back for three-week vacations at a time . It 's not clear whether she married you for love , money or a Green Card . You need to consult a divorce lawyer , but I have a hunch that she will be out of luck on all three .
domestication: 你这情况换作别人，怕是早就忍不下去了。你老婆当初回她祖国的理由挺正当的，但为了上牙科学校就一直待在那里，未免太无情无义了。想不通吧，同一个女人，怎么结婚才两天就抛下你不顾，一年到头只回来度个三周的假。她嫁给你到底是图爱情、图钱还是图绿卡，到现在还是一团迷雾。你得找离婚律师咨询一下，不过我估摸着，她这三样怕是都捞不到了。
foreignization: 你比大多数人处于你的处境时更有耐心。你妻子最初回到她祖国的原因是正当的，但为了开始牙科学校的学习而留在那里似乎过于残忍和不寻常。这一定很难理解，你结婚的那个女人怎么会如此冷酷，在结婚两天后就离开你，而且每次只回来度三周的假。不清楚她是因为爱、钱还是绿卡而嫁给你。你需要咨询离婚律师，但我有一种预感，她在三个方面都会落空。

source: The U.S. health care system is often criticized as wasteful because many procedures are " unnecessary . " One source of evidence for unnecessary medical care is a series of studies that show wide variations in the rate of treatment among different U.S. communities , with no apparent justification . One might suppose that in countries where health care is rationed and many medical needs are unmet , doctors would tend to provide only necessary care . That is not the case . Treatment rates in Canada also vary considerably . For example : There is a four-to-one difference among Canadian counties in the rate of cesarean sections . There is a four-to-one difference in rates of tonsillectomy and hysterectomy and a two-to-one difference in the rates of mastectomy , prostatectomy , and cholecystectomy .
domestication: 美国的医疗系统常被批评为浪费严重，因为很多诊疗程序是“不必要的”。其中一个证据来源是一系列研究，显示不同社区之间的治疗率存在很大差异，而这些差异没有明显的理由。有人可能认为，在医疗资源分配受限、许多医疗需求得不到满足的国家，医生们会倾向于只提供必要的治疗。但事实并非如此。加拿大的治疗率也相差甚远。比如：加拿大各地的剖腹产率相差四倍；扁桃体切除术和子宫切除术的比率也有四倍之差，而乳房切除术、前列腺切除术和胆囊切除术的比率则相差两倍。
foreignization: 美国医疗系统经常因其许多程序“不必要”而受到批评。证明不必要医疗服务的一个证据来源是一系列研究表明，在不同的美国社区之间，治疗率存在很大的差异，且没有明显的理由。人们可能会认为，在医疗资源分配有限、许多医疗需求未得到满足的国家，医生往往会只提供必要的护理。事实并非如此。加拿大的治疗率也存在相当大的差异。例如：在加拿大各县，剖宫产率存在四倍的差异。扁桃体切除术和子宫切除术的比率也存在四倍的差异，而乳房切除术、前列腺切除术和胆囊切除术的比率则存在两倍的差异。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The U.S. health care system is often criticized as wasteful because many procedures are " unnecessary . " One source of evidence for unnecessary medical care is a series of studies that show wide variations in the rate of treatment among different U.S. communities , with no apparent justification . One might suppose that in countries where health care is rationed and many medical needs are unmet , doctors would tend to provide only necessary care . That is not the case . Treatment rates in Canada also vary considerably . For example : There is a four-to-one difference among Canadian counties in the rate of cesarean sections . There is a four-to-one difference in rates of tonsillectomy and hysterectomy and a two-to-one difference in the rates of mastectomy , prostatectomy , and cholecystectomy .

source: Music played before battle varied , and it often reflected a preferred style of fighting . Martial songs from the era of Prussian ruler Frederick the Great , circa 1 760 , were stately and imposing , with flutes , strings , and an occasional horn . Listen , and you can picture the rigid , slow , and disciplined infantry tactics of that time .
domestication: 战前演奏的音乐种类繁多，通常反映出将士们偏好的战斗风格。普鲁士国王腓特烈大帝时期，大约在1760年左右，军乐庄严雄伟，以长笛、弦乐为主，偶尔加入号角。你仔细听，就能想象出当时那种严谨、缓慢而纪律严明的步兵战术。
foreignization: 战前演奏的音乐各不相同，通常反映了某种偏好的战斗风格。普鲁士统治者腓特烈大帝时期（约1760年）的军事歌曲庄严而宏伟，使用了长笛、弦乐和偶尔的号角。聆听这些音乐，你可以想象出那个时代的步兵战术是多么的严格、缓慢且有纪律。

source: Some business spending canceled itself out . Since businesses often lobby against each other -- AT &T,; for instance , against the Baby Bells -- business contributions did n't necessarily guarantee a clear outcome and have even provided an opportunity for other organizations to hold the balance of power . But corporate lobbying and campaign contributions have guaranteed that , on issues that clearly divide business from consumers or labor , business would prevail . That first became apparent in the Carter administration when the AFL-CIO lost on labor law reform , consumer groups lost on their plan for an Office of Consumer Representation , and business succeeded in transforming Carter 's progressive tax reform plan into a capital gains tax cut for business and the wealthy .
domestication: 有些商业支出相互抵消了。企业之间经常互相博弈，比如AT&T就常与“小贝尔”公司对着干，所以企业的政治献金并不一定能确保某个明确的结果，反而给其他组织提供了制衡的机会。但企业游说和政治献金确实保证了，在那些明显将企业和消费者或劳工对立起来的问题上，企业总能获胜。这一现象最早在卡特政府时期就显现出来：当时美国劳工联合会-产业工会联合会（AFL-CIO）在劳动法改革上的努力失败了，消费者团体提出的设立消费者代表处的计划也泡汤了，而商界却成功地将卡特的税制改革方案从进步的税收改革变成了对企业和富人的资本利得税减免。

Some business spending canceled itself out . That first became apparent in the Carter administration when the AFL-CIO lost on labor law reform , consumer groups lost on their plan for an Office of Consumer Representation , and business succeeded in transforming Carter 's progressive tax reform plan into a capital gains tax cut for business and the wealthy .

source: By mixing and matching components , Felt delivers a performance road package on this aluminum frame and carbon fork . A BB30 bottom bracket , replaceable derailleur hanger and external cable routing make the F75 an able workhorse , capable of high performance and tough enough to survive a few scrapes. -A.J.B .
domestication: 通过灵活搭配组件，Felt 在这款铝架和碳纤维前叉上，打造了一套性能出色的公路车配置。BB30 中轴、可更换的后变速器挂耳和外走线设计，让 F75 成为了性能优秀又耐用的工作马，即使磕磕碰碰也能挺得住。-A.J.B.
foreignization: 通过混合搭配组件，Felt 在这个铝制车架和碳纤维前叉上提供了一套性能公路配置。BB30 底碗、可更换的后变速器吊耳和外走线设计使 F75 成为一匹称职的千里马，既能够实现高性能，又足够坚固以应对几次擦碰。-A.J.B.

" This gives you more mental space to focus on the other person , to practice wishing kindness and wanting them to be well , and I think both parts are really important for effectively responding to people suffering . "

source: Rival claims follow in the wake of any heroic accomplishment . Columbus was born in Genoa of Italian parents in 1451 , and it has been insisted that he was a full-blooded Spaniard , a Catalan , or a Jew of Portuguese or Catalan descent , but the evidence suggests that he was a Catholic of Genoese origin . Whatever his background , he basked in that wondrous confluence of Arab , Jewish , and Christian genius that marked the intellectual world of Portugal and Spain during the early Renaissance . The undisputed facts are that his father was Domenico Colombo , and his mother was Susanna Fontanarossa , both of Genoa . They had two younger sons , Bartolomeo and Giacomo ( later known as Diego ) , and a daughter , Bianchinetta . The family business was weaving . Domenico managed a decent living as a member of the clothiers ' guild , but his prospects for improvement were never very bright .
domestication: 英雄壮举之后，总免不了出现各种争议。哥伦布1451年出生在意大利的热那亚，有人坚持说他是纯正的西班牙人、加泰罗尼亚人，或者是葡萄牙或加泰罗尼亚血统的犹太人，但证据表明他是一位来自热那亚的天主教徒。无论他的背景如何，他都沐浴在那个阿拉伯、犹太和基督教天才汇聚的神奇潮流中，这标志着文艺复兴早期葡萄牙和西班牙的知识世界。毋庸置疑的是，他的父亲是多梅尼科·哥伦布，母亲是苏珊娜·丰塔纳罗萨，两人都是热那亚人。他们还有两个小儿子，巴托洛梅奥和贾科莫（后来叫迭戈），以及一个女儿，比安奇内塔。家里世代以织布为生。多梅尼科作为布商行会的一员，日子过得还算不错，但家境改善的希望一直不大。
foreignization: 任何英雄壮举之后都会随之而来相互竞争的主张。哥伦布于1451年出生在意大利父母的故乡热那亚，有人坚持认为他是纯种西班牙人、加泰罗尼亚人或葡萄牙或加泰罗尼亚血统的犹太人，但证据表明他是一位热那亚血统的天主教徒。无论他的背景如何，他沐浴在那个标志着葡萄牙和西班牙早期文艺复兴时期的知识界的阿拉伯、犹太和基督教天才的奇妙融合之中。无可争议的事实是，他的父亲是多梅尼科·哥伦布，母亲是苏珊娜·丰塔纳罗萨，两人都是热那亚人。他们有两个较小的儿子，巴托洛梅奥和贾科莫（后来被称为迭戈），以及一个女儿，比安基内塔。家庭业务是织布。多梅尼科作为布商公会的一员，勉强维持着体面的生活，但他改善生活的前景从来都不太光明。

任何英雄壮举之后都会随之而来相互竞争的主张。哥伦布于1451年出生在意大利父母的故乡热那亚，有人坚持认为他是纯种西班牙人、加泰罗尼亚人或葡萄牙或加泰罗尼亚血统的犹太人，但证据表明他是一位热那亚血统的天主教徒。无论他的背景如何，他沐浴在那个标志着葡萄牙和西班牙早期文艺复兴时期的知识界的阿拉伯、犹太和基督教天才的奇妙融合之中。无可争议的事实是，他的父亲是多梅尼科·哥伦布，母亲是苏珊娜·丰塔纳罗萨，两人都是热那亚人。他们有两个较小的儿子，巴托洛梅奥和贾科莫（后来被称为迭戈），以及一个女儿，比安基内塔。家庭业务是织布。多梅尼科作为布商公会的一员，勉强维持着体面的生活，但他改善生活的前景从来都不太光明。

source: Tod Hamilton ! might not have set Hollywood on fire , but Duhamel made the most of his marquee moment and showed he was more than just a set of dimples . It 's that old career chestnut : " You want a big title and bigger responsibility , even if it 's in a smatter pond , " McIntyre says . " It 's easier for an employer to trust you in a Leading rote if you 've already shown you can hack it . " DENNY WATKINS

source: One mother who 'd been compiling a list of the half-siblings of her own baby by Raul 's sperm wrote on Cryobank 's bulletin board that she had already found 22 " success stories " by networking online . When I e-mailed her , she replied , " I am not comfortable disclosing the exact number of siblings , but I will say there are more than I had initially hoped . "

source: Additionally , many low-wageworkers at the chain were subject to excruciating working conditions as a result of the increased demand . Some workers put in 60-hour weeks to meet demand ; another told Vox that she worked a 12-hour shift until her legs went numb . One photo of a dejected-looking Popeyes employee sitting outside the store even went viral , receiving the full meme treatment ( though many later correctly pointed out that exploiting an exhausted worker for the amusement of the Twitter masses was perhaps not the most sensitive response . ) Such stories should n't just serve as grist for the viral news mill ; they should serve as testament to the damage wrought by a capitalism system fueled by incessant demand and an obsessive focus on the bottom line , and should be read accordingly .
domestication: 此外，由于需求激增，连锁店里的许多低薪工人还得忍受痛苦的工作环境。有些工人每周要工作60个小时来满足需求；还有人告诉Vox，她连续工作了12个小时，直到腿都麻木了。一张看起来很沮丧的Popeyes员工坐在店外的照片还走红网络，被做成各种梗图（不过后来很多人指出，拿一个疲惫不堪的工人的形象取乐，并不是什么明智之举）。这样的故事不应该只是病毒新闻的素材；它们应该作为证据，证明这种不断增长的需求和对利润的痴迷所驱动的资本主义制度造成的危害，我们应当以此为鉴。
foreignization: 此外，由于需求增加，该连锁店的许多低薪工人遭受了痛苦的工作条件。一些工人每周工作60小时以满足需求；另一名工人告诉Vox，她工作了一个12小时的轮班，直到双腿麻木。一张看起来沮丧的Popeyes员工坐在店外的照片甚至走红网络，得到了完整的模因处理（尽管后来许多人正确地指出，为了取悦Twitter大众而利用一名疲惫的工人也许不是最敏感的回应。）这样的故事不应该仅仅成为病毒新闻的素材；它们应该作为证据，证明一个由不断增长的需求和对底线的痴迷驱动的资本主义体系所造成的损害，并应据此阅读。

source: Scandals unrelated to such major themes are unlikely to go anywhere in election years , as I learned firsthand many years ago . When Bill Clinton was running for reelection in 1996 , I was a regular visitor to Dick Morris 's suite at the Jefferson Hotel . Morris was then a shadowy figure who almost never talked to the press . ( When I interviewed him and his sidekick , Mark Penn , I had no idea that a few weeks later a supermarket tabloid would reveal that Morris was getting his toes sucked in the suite by a prostitute . ) At the time , Morris 's client , Clinton , was the subject of daily scandal stories about secret Asian fund-raising . Morris waved off the stories , explaining that only a mammoth scandal like Watergate eveT has any actual influence over voters . That 's especially true in a bad economy .
domestication: 跟大选主题无关的丑闻，在选举年里是很难引起关注的，这一点我多年前就领教过了。当年比尔·克林顿竞选连任时，我经常出入迪克·莫里斯在杰斐逊酒店的套房。那时候，莫里斯是个几乎不跟媒体打交道的神秘人物。（后来我采访他和他的搭档马克·潘时，怎么也想不到几周后，一家超市小报会爆出莫里斯在那套房子里找妓女的事儿。）当时，莫里斯的客户克林顿，每天都要面对关于秘密亚洲筹款活动的丑闻报道。但莫里斯对此不屑一顾，他说只有像水门事件那样的惊天大丑闻，才能真正影响选民。尤其是在经济不景气的时候，这更是千真万确。
foreignization: 与这些主要主题无关的丑闻在选举年不太可能有进展，这是我多年前亲身体会到的。当比尔·克林顿在1996年竞选连任时，我是迪克·莫里斯在杰斐逊酒店套房的常客。莫里斯当时是一个几乎从不与媒体交谈的神秘人物。（当我采访他和他的搭档马克·佩恩时，我根本没想到几周后一家超市小报会揭露莫里斯在套房里被一名妓女吸吮脚趾的事情。）当时，莫里斯的客户克林顿每天都有关于秘密亚洲筹款的丑闻报道。莫里斯对这些报道不屑一顾，解释说只有像水门事件那样巨大的丑闻才对选民有实际影响。尤其是在经济不景气的时候。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Scandals unrelated to such major themes are unlikely to go anywhere in election years , as I learned firsthand many years ago . When Bill Clinton was running for reelection in 1996 , I was a regular visitor to Dick Morris 's suite at the Jefferson Hotel . Morris was then a shadowy figure who almost never talked to the press . ( When I interviewed him and his sidekick , Mark Penn , I had no idea that a few weeks later a supermarket tabloid would reveal that Morris was getting his toes sucked in the suite by a prostitute . ) At the time , Morris 's client , Clinton , was the subject of daily scandal stories about secret Asian fund-raising . Morris waved off the stories , explaining that only a mammoth scandal like Watergate eveT has any actual influence over voters . That 's especially true in a bad economy .

( When I interviewed him and his sidekick , Mark Penn , I had no idea that a few weeks later a supermarket tabloid would reveal that Morris was getting his toes sucked in the suite by a prostitute . ) At the time , Morris 's client , Clinton , was the subject of daily scandal stories about secret Asian fund-raising . Morris waved off the stories , explaining that only a mammoth scandal like Watergate eveT has any actual influence over voters . That 's especially true in a bad economy .

与这些主要主题无关的丑闻在选举年不太可能有进展，这是我多年前亲身体会到的。当比尔·克林顿在1996年竞选连任时，我是迪克·莫里斯在杰斐逊酒店套房的常客。莫里斯当时是一个几乎从不与媒体交谈的神秘人物。（当我采访他和他的搭档马克·佩恩时，我根本没想到几周后一家超市小报会揭露莫里斯在套房里被一名妓女吸吮脚趾的事情。）当时，莫里斯的客户克林顿每天都有关于秘密亚洲筹款的丑闻报道。莫里斯对这些报道不屑一顾，解释说只有像水门事件那样巨大的丑闻才对选民有实际影响。尤其是在经济不景气的时候。

source: The mystery bookstore is largely a phenomenon of the last decade . Booksellers in general are a dedicated bunch , and the proprietors of stores dealing exclusively in mysteries would not be in the field if they did not love it . Their shops often have the ambience of clubhouses , and many of their customers drop in as much to chat as to buy books . Murder Ink , Grounds for Murder , Sherlock 's Home , Rue Morgue , Footprints of a Gigantic Hound , Booked for Murder , Foul Play , The Butler Did it , Murder Undercover , Once Upon a Crime , Murder for Pleasure , Scene of the Crime-the ingenuity displayed in the stores ' names suggests the resourcefulness of the people who operate them .
domestication: 神秘书店主要是最近十年才兴起的现象。书商向来都是个有激情的群体，专门经营侦探小说的店主若不是打心底热爱这一行，也不会投身其中。他们的店铺常常有着俱乐部般的氛围，许多顾客光顾这里，更多是为了闲聊而不是买书。《墨水谋杀案》、《凶杀现场》、《福尔摩斯之家》、《巨犬足迹》、《因谋杀而订书》、《罪行不轨》、《管家作案》、《秘密谋杀》、《犯罪之初》、《为乐谋杀》、《犯罪现场》——这些店铺的名字无不透露出经营者们的机智和创意。
foreignization: 神秘书店主要是过去十年的现象。书商一般来说是一群敬业的人，而专门经营神秘小说的商店老板如果不是热爱这个领域，是不会在这个领域内的。他们的店铺往往具有俱乐部的氛围，许多顾客光顾更多的是为了聊天而不是买书。《谋杀墨水》、《谋杀的理由》、《福尔摩斯之家》、《巨犬的足迹》、《因谋杀而预订》、《恶行》、《管家干的》、《暗中谋杀》、《从前有桩罪案》、《为乐谋杀》、《犯罪现场》——这些店铺名称所展现的独创性表明了经营这些店铺的人们的机智。

The mystery bookstore is largely a phenomenon of the last decade . Booksellers in general are a dedicated bunch , and the proprietors of stores dealing exclusively in mysteries would not be in the field if they did not love it . Their shops often have the ambience of clubhouses , and many of their customers drop in as much to chat as to buy books . Murder Ink , Grounds for Murder , Sherlock 's Home , Rue Morgue , Footprints of a Gigantic Hound , Booked for Murder , Foul Play , The Butler Did it , Murder Undercover , Once Upon a Crime , Murder for Pleasure , Scene of the Crime-the ingenuity displayed in the stores ' names suggests the resourcefulness of the people who operate them .

source: 1 . ESPN 's MLB broadcast from Cuba on Wednesday afternoon -- the network is airing an exhibition game at 1:30 p.m . ET between the Tampa Bay Rays and the Cuban National Team from Estadio Latinoamericano in Havana -- is a personal one for Eduardo Perez . The ESPN MLB analyst is the son of Hall of Famer Tony Perez , who was born in Ciego de ? vila , Cuba and was signed to a pro contract in 1960 at age 17 by a Reds scout while playing on a sugar factory team . It 's been 25 years since Eduardo , now 46 , has been to Cuba to see his extended family . He will serve as the game 's analyst on alongside play by play announcer Karl Ravech and fellow analyst Doug Glanville . ESPN reporter Pedro Gomez , who is the son of Cuban refugees , will provide reports , as will ESPN MLB Insider Tim Kurkjian .
domestication: ESPN 周三下午从古巴直播的这场大联盟比赛——网络上播放的一场表演赛，时间是美国东部时间下午1点30分，对阵双方是坦帕湾光芒队和古巴国家队，比赛地点在哈瓦那的拉丁美洲体育场——对于埃杜阿多·佩雷斯来说，意义非凡。埃杜阿多是名人堂成员托尼·佩雷斯的儿子。托尼出生在古巴的希霍德阿维拉，17岁时被红人队球探相中，签下了职业合同。当时他正在一家糖厂队打球。埃杜阿多今年46岁，已经有25年没回古巴探望他的大家庭了。这次比赛中，他将作为解说分析师与实况解说员卡尔·拉维奇和另一位分析师道格·格兰维尔一起工作。ESPN记者佩德罗·戈麦斯，他的父母是古巴难民，也将提供现场报道，还有ESPN大联盟内部人士蒂姆·库克吉安也会参与报道。

source: Stark : There are n't as many choices as you 'd think . Very few players in this sport are what I 'd describe as difficult or unpleasant to interview . But who 's the toughest ? I 'd vote for Yasiel Puig . Part of this is cultural , I 'm sure . But he 's always struck me as a guy who has no understanding of what we do and regards the media as not much more than a nuisance . Of course , where he came from , there was no equivalent to the American sports media and no requirement for any player to speak with the media . So I get it . But that does n't make him any easier to deal with .  How would you define the access you receive from MLB teams on a day-to-day basis during the regular season ?
domestication: 斯塔克：选择其实没那么多。在这项运动中，真正难对付或者采访起来不愉快的球员其实很少。但要说最难对付的，我会选亚赛尔·普伊格。这肯定有文化因素在里面。但我觉得他一直都不明白我们在做什么，觉得媒体也就是个麻烦。当然，他来自的地方没有像美国这样的体育媒体，也没有要求运动员必须跟媒体交流的规定。所以我也理解。但这并不意味着他好打交道。你如何定义在常规赛季期间，从大联盟球队那里每天获得的采访权限呢？
foreignization: 斯塔克：选择并没有你想象的那么多。这项运动中很少有球员我会形容为难以采访或不愉快的。但谁是最难对付的？我投票给亚赛尔·普伊格。这在很大程度上是文化的因素，我敢肯定。但他总是给我一种感觉，他对我们的工作没有理解，并且认为媒体不过是麻烦而已。当然，在他来自的地方，没有像美国体育媒体这样的东西，也没有要求任何球员必须与媒体交谈的规定。所以我能理解。但这并不让他变得更容易打交道。你在常规赛期间从美职棒大联盟球队那里每天得到的访问权限是如何定义的？

source: In 1986 Pilgrim 's Pride was enjoying its best year to date : It earned $19 million on $375 million in sales . But Pilgrim knew the prosperity would be transitory , because the company was almost entirely dependent on highly cyclical commodity chicken sales . Twice over the years , commodity chicken downcycles had almost bankrupted Pilgrim 's Pride .
domestication: 1986年，皮尔格林骄傲公司迎来了它的黄金时期：销售额达到了3.75亿美元，赚了1900万美元。但皮尔格林心里清楚，好景不长，因为公司的命脉几乎完全系在周期性极强的鸡肉销售上。这些年来，鸡肉市场两次大跌，差点让皮尔格林骄傲公司破产。
foreignization: 1986年，Pilgrim's Pride 正在享受其迄今为止最好的一年：它在3.75亿美元的销售额中赚取了1900万美元。但 Pilgrim 知道这种繁荣将是短暂的，因为公司几乎完全依赖于高度周期性的商品鸡肉销售。多年来，商品鸡肉的下行周期曾两次差点使 Pilgrim's Pride 破产。

1986年，Pilgrim's Pride 正在享受其迄今为止最好的一年：它在3.75亿美元的销售额中赚取了1900万美元。但 Pilgrim 知道这种繁荣将是短暂的，因为公司几乎完全依赖于高度周期性的商品鸡肉销售。多年来，商品鸡肉的下行周期曾两次差点使 Pilgrim's Pride 破产。

source: " Many of my paintings include a narrative that has symbolic elements in it , " he adds . " Often , they reflect my interest in history . I also like what I call anticipatory paintings , ' works that capture a moment in which something is about to happen , such as Honey , I 'm Home , " he says . " The presence of light in the work is meaningful to me in a spiritual sense ; I prefer to have natural light coming in from somewhere . "
domestication: 他补充说：“我的很多画作里都包含了一个带有象征意义的故事。”他还说，“这些画经常反映出我对历史的兴趣。我也喜欢我称之为‘预期性’的画作，就是捕捉某个即将发生事情的瞬间，比如《亲爱的，我回来了》。”“画中的光线对我来说有精神上的意义；我更喜欢让自然光从某个地方透进来。”
foreignization: “我的许多画作中包含有象征元素的叙事，”他补充道。“往往，它们反映了我对历史的兴趣。我还喜欢我称之为预示性的画作，’捕捉某个即将发生的事情的瞬间，比如《亲爱的，我回来了》。”他说，“作品中的光的存在对我而言具有精神上的意义；我更喜欢有自然光从某个地方照进来。”

" Many of my paintings include a narrative that has symbolic elements in it , " he adds . " Often , they reflect my interest in history . I also like what I call anticipatory paintings , ' works that capture a moment in which something is about to happen , such as Honey , I 'm Home , " he says . " The presence of light in the work is meaningful to me in a spiritual sense ; I prefer to have natural light coming in from somewhere . "
他补充说：“我的很多画作里都包含了一个带有象征意义的故事。”他还说，“这些画经常反映出我对历史的兴趣。我也喜欢我称之为‘预期性’的画作，就是捕捉某个即将发生事情的瞬间，比如《亲爱的，我回来了》。”“画中的光线对我来说有精神上的意义；我更喜欢让自然光从某个地方透进来。”

" Many of my paintings include a narrative that has symbolic elements in it , " he adds . " Often , they reflect my interest in history . I also like what I call anticipatory paintings , ' works that capture a moment in which something is about to happen , such as Honey , I 'm Home , " he says . " The presence of light in the work is meaningful to me in a spiritual sense ; I prefer to have natural light coming in from somewhere . "
“我的许多画作中包含有象征元素的叙事，”他补充道。“往往，它们反映了我对历史的兴趣。我还喜欢我称之为预示性的画作，’捕捉某个即将发生的事情的瞬间，比如《亲爱的，我回来了》。”他说，“作品中的光的存在对我而言具有精神上的意义；我更喜欢有自然光从某个地方照进来。”

source: Common water hemp has risen to become one of the most serious weeds in Midwestern corn and soy . In a study also appearing in the June 8 Journal of Agricultural and Food Chemistry , Tranel 's team reports finding water hemp simultaneously immune to as many as four functional classes of herbicides - including glyphosate 's class . In the March Pest Management Science , the team reported water hemp 's resistance to yet a fifth herbicide group .
domestication: 普通水蓬草已经成了中西部玉米和大豆田里最棘手的杂草之一。6月8日出版的《农业与食品化学杂志》上，特拉内尔的团队报告说，他们发现水蓬草竟然能同时对多达四种除草剂的功能类别产生抗性，其中包括草甘膦这一类。而在3月份的《害虫管理科学》杂志上，该团队还报告了水蓬草对另一种除草剂类别也产生了抗性。这可真是“道高一尺，魔高一丈”啊。
foreignization: 普通水蒿已上升为中西部玉米和大豆中最严重的杂草之一。在6月8日出版的《农业与食品化学杂志》上发表的一项研究中，Tranel的团队报告称发现水蒿同时对多达四类除草剂具有抗性——包括草甘膦所属的类别。在3月份的《害虫管理科学》杂志中，该团队报告了水蒿对第五类除草剂的抗性。

source: Just how bad is the problem ? Examples of digital things lost forever abound , some personal in scale , some global . Software patents that can be infringed freely because the original software no longer works , preventing the patent holders from proving prior art . Land use and natural-resource inventories for the State of New York compiled in the late 1960s that ca n't be accessed because the customized software needed to open the files no longer exists . NASA satellite data from the 1970s that might have helped us understand global warming , were they not unreadable today .
domestication: 这问题有多严重？数字资料永久丢失的例子比比皆是，有的涉及个人，有的影响全球。比如，由于原软件已无法运行，专利持有人无法证明已有技术，导致软件专利可以被随意侵犯。再如，20世纪60年代末纽约州编制的土地使用和自然资源清单，因为需要的定制软件已经消失，这些文件现在无法打开。还有NASA在70年代的卫星数据，如果现在还能读取，本可以帮助我们更好地理解全球变暖。
foreignization: 这个问题到底有多严重？数字资料永久丢失的例子比比皆是，有些是个人层面的，有些则是全球性的。因为原始软件已无法运行，导致专利持有人无法证明先前技术，从而使得软件专利可以被随意侵权。纽约州在20世纪60年代末编制的土地使用和自然资源清查数据，由于打开文件所需的定制软件已不复存在而无法访问。NASA在20世纪70年代的卫星数据，如果今天还能读取的话，本可以帮助我们理解全球变暖。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Just how bad is the problem ? Examples of digital things lost forever abound , some personal in scale , some global . Software patents that can be infringed freely because the original software no longer works , preventing the patent holders from proving prior art . Land use and natural-resource inventories for the State of New York compiled in the late 1960s that ca n't be accessed because the customized software needed to open the files no longer exists . NASA satellite data from the 1970s that might have helped us understand global warming , were they not unreadable today .
这问题有多严重？数字资料永久丢失的例子比比皆是，有的涉及个人，有的影响全球。比如，由于原软件已无法运行，专利持有人无法证明已有技术，导致软件专利可以被随意侵犯。再如，20世纪60年代末纽约州编制的土地使用和自然资源清单，因为需要的定制软件已经消失，这些文件现在无法打开。还有NASA在70年代的卫星数据，如果现在还能读取，本可以帮助我们更好地理解全球变暖。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Just how bad is the problem ? Examples of digital things lost forever abound , some personal in scale , some global . Software patents that can be infringed freely because the original software no longer works , preventing the patent holders from proving prior art . Land use and natural-resource inventories for the State of New York compiled in the late 1960s that ca n't be accessed because the customized software needed to open the files no longer exists . NASA satellite data from the 1970s that might have helped us understand global warming , were they not unreadable today .
这个问题到底有多严重？数字资料永久丢失的例子比比皆是，有些是个人层面的，有些则是全球性的。因为原始软件已无法运行，导致专利持有人无法证明先前技术，从而使得软件专利可以被随意侵权。纽约州在20世纪60年代末编制的土地使用和自然资源清查数据，由于打开文件所需的定制软件已不复存在而无法访问。NASA在20世纪70年代的卫星数据，如果今天还能读取的话，本可以帮助我们理解全球变暖。

source: But here 's the thing : Worrying about a fatty food you rarely eat steers emphasis away from more pressing matters . " Instead , we should focus on portion size , eating frequency and getting a variety of foods -- which are all simple behaviors to change , " says Dr. Callaway . And since the major reason for obesity is decreased activity levels , he says , better to emphasize the importance of getting a daily jog rather than switching from hot buttered kernels to chocolate raisins at the cinema .
domestication: 但问题是：担心偶尔吃一次的高脂食物，反而让我们忽略了更重要的事情。卡洛威博士说：“我们更应该关注的是食量、进食频率和食物多样性——这些都是很容易改变的习惯。”而且，肥胖的主要原因是活动量减少，所以他建议，与其从电影院里的黄油爆米花换到巧克力葡萄干，不如强调每天都要运动的重要性。
foreignization: 但这里的问题是：担心你很少吃的食物含有脂肪会使你忽视更紧迫的问题。“相反，我们应该关注份量大小、进食频率和食物多样性——这些都是一些简单的行为改变，”卡洛威博士说。由于肥胖的主要原因是活动水平下降，他说，最好强调每天进行慢跑的重要性，而不是在电影院将热黄油爆米花换成巧克力葡萄干。

source: As we 've written before , sorting congressional districts by the two variables of race and education produces what we call the four quadrants of Congress : districts with high levels of racial diversity and high levels of white education ( what we call " hi-hi " districts ) , districts with high levels of racial diversity and low levels of white education ( " hi-lo districts " ) , districts with low levels of diversity and high levels of white education ( " lo-hi districts " ) , and districts with low levels of diversity and low levels of white education ( " lo-lo districts " ) .  Hi-Hi Districts
domestication: 正如我们之前写过的，按照种族和教育这两个变量来划分国会选区，可以得出我们所说的国会四大象限：一个是种族多样性高且白人教育水平也高的选区（我们称之为“双双高”选区），另一个是种族多样性高但白人教育水平低的选区（“一高一低”选区），再一个是种族多样性低但白人教育水平高的选区（“一低一高”选区），还有就是种族多样性低且白人教育水平也低的选区（“双双低”选区）。双双高选区

source: The first is that the Affordable Care Act is a misnomer ? in other words , it does n't really provide " affordable care " ? because the newly insured on Medicaid ca n't find doctors who will see them , and the ones with private coverage are stuck with high out-of-pocket costs that make even modest medical treatment prohibitively expensive .

foreignization: 第一个问题是《平价医疗法案》名不符实——换句话说，它并没有真正提供“负担得起的医疗服务”——因为新获得医疗补助的人找不到愿意接诊他们的医生，而那些拥有私人保险的人则不得不承担高额的自付费用，这使得即使是适度的医疗治疗也变得难以承受。

source: Ritchie was a miniaturist in an age when writers are judged by the number of trees cut down to print their work . He wrote only short stories , and he tried to do so without wasting a word . His work was sprightly and surprising and always engaging , and he never wrote an awkward sentence or a lifeless line of dialogue .

foreignization: 里奇是一个在作家们以砍伐了多少树木来印刷他们的作品而被评判的时代中的微缩艺术家。他只写短篇小说，并且努力做到不浪费一个词。他的作品活泼、出人意料，始终引人入胜，而且他从未写过一个笨拙的句子或一段毫无生气的对话。

Ritchie was a miniaturist in an age when writers are judged by the number of trees cut down to print their work . He wrote only short stories , and he tried to do so without wasting a word . His work was sprightly and surprising and always engaging , and he never wrote an awkward sentence or a lifeless line of dialogue .
里奇是一个在作家们以砍伐了多少树木来印刷他们的作品而被评判的时代中的微缩艺术家。他只写短篇小说，并且努力做到不浪费一个词。他的作品活泼、出人意料，始终引人入胜，而且他从未写过一个笨拙的句子或一段毫无生气的对话。

source: How such people get there requires a lot of pretzel logic , so bear with me : They start with a false premise , that feminism requires that no woman ever say an uncharitable thing about another woman . ( This has never actually been a requirement of feminism , or how could we criticize women like Sarah Palin or Phyllis Schlafly ? ) Then they zero in on the fact that Clinton said not-nice things on occasion about her husband 's mistresses . They then pretend to be all appalled about what a terrible sexist she is , and claim she can no longer allowed to say anything about real sexism ever again .
domestication: 这些人怎么得出这种结论，真是绕得跟 pretzel（拧麻花）似的，你就忍忍吧：他们先摆出个错误的前提，说女权主义要求女人永远不能对其他女人说不中听的话。（这从来不是女权主义的要求，不然我们怎么能批评像莎拉·佩林或菲莉丝·斯莱夫利这样的女性呢？）然后他们抓住克林顿偶尔对丈夫的情人说些不好听的话这一点大做文章。接着他们装出一副极其震惊的样子，指责她是个多么糟糕的性别歧视者，并声称她从此以后再也不能对真正的性别歧视发表任何意见了。

source: MCR eventually moved in anyway , but rather than leasing out the sixth floor from Davey , the company leased the fourth floor from Albion Pacific at a rate lower than Davey could afford to give . Not only that , but when MCR CEO Matthew Harrigan hired his own contractors to complete the connection to WinStar 's T1 line and subtracted the charges from its rent payment to Albion , Meieran turned around and submitted the bills to Davey . After all , under the terms of Davey and Albion 's agreement , the building should have been fully Internet-enabled already , and Davey was contractually accountable for any associated expenses .
domestication: MCR 最终还是搬进去了，不过他们没有从戴维那里租六楼，而是以比戴维能给的更低的价格从阿尔比恩太平洋公司租了四楼。不仅如此，MCR 的 CEO 马修·哈里根还自己找了承包商来完成与温星公司的 T1 线路的连接，并且把这笔费用从付给阿尔比恩的租金里扣掉了。梅厄兰一转身就把这些账单甩给了戴维。毕竟按照戴维和阿尔比恩之间的协议，大楼本该已经全面接入互联网，而任何相关费用都得由戴维承担。

source: The first signs of spring signal a clear change on the stove top . Farewell , slow-cook methods , such as simmering and braising ... hello , speedy techniques , such as stir- frying ! Whether you 're making sauce-coated tofu with bok choy or an East- meets-West spin on lemony asparagus , the same rules of stir-frying apply to give spring vegetables a hint of savory caramelization while keeping their fresh flavor intact : have all ingredients chopped , measured , and ready to go ; keep your wok very hot ; and , whateveryou do , do n't stop stirring .
domestication: 春意初现，厨房里也换了新颜。告别慢炖和红烧，迎接快炒的季节！不论是豆豉炒白菜豆腐，还是东西合璧的柠檬芦笋，快炒的秘诀都一样：食材切好、量好、备好；锅要烧得滚烫；无论怎样，千万别停下手里的铲子。这样炒出来的春季蔬菜，既有焦香的美味，又保持了鲜嫩的口感。
foreignization: 春天的最初迹象预示着炉灶上的明显变化。再见，慢煮方法，如炖和焖……你好，快速烹饪技巧，如炒！无论你是制作带酱料的白菜炒豆腐还是东西方结合的柠檬味芦笋，同样的炒菜规则都适用，以赋予春季蔬菜一丝美味的焦糖化，同时保持它们的新鲜风味：将所有食材切好、称量并准备好；保持你的锅非常热；还有，无论你做什么，都不要停止翻炒。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The first signs of spring signal a clear change on the stove top . Farewell , slow-cook methods , such as simmering and braising ... hello , speedy techniques , such as stir- frying ! Whether you 're making sauce-coated tofu with bok choy or an East- meets-West spin on lemony asparagus , the same rules of stir-frying apply to give spring vegetables a hint of savory caramelization while keeping their fresh flavor intact : have all ingredients chopped , measured , and ready to go ; keep your wok very hot ; and , whateveryou do , do n't stop stirring .

source: The key to working with Moche art has been to photograph objects in museums and private collections throughout the world . In the Moche Archive , located on the campus of the University of California in Los Angeles ( UCLA ) , we now have more than 135,000 photographs of such objects , all organized by subject matter . Photographs of objects depicting deer hunting , for example , are kept together , as are those of objects depicting architecture , warfare , and distinct ceremonies . This archive serves as an important resource for the study of Moche culture .
domestication: 研究莫切艺术的关键在于拍摄世界各地博物馆和私人收藏中的文物。在位于美国加州大学洛杉矶分校的莫切档案馆里，我们现在已经有超过13万5千张这样的照片，全部按照主题分类。比如，描绘猎鹿场景的照片放在一起，建筑、战争和各种仪式的图像也是如此。这个档案馆成了研究莫切文化的重要宝库。
foreignization: 与莫切艺术合作的关键是在世界各地的博物馆和私人收藏中拍摄文物。在位于加利福尼亚大学洛杉矶分校（UCLA）校园内的莫切档案馆中，我们现在有超过135,000张此类文物的照片，所有照片都按主题分类。例如，描绘鹿狩猎的文物照片被放在一起，描绘建筑、战争和独特仪式的文物照片也是如此。该档案馆是研究莫切文化的重要资源。

The key to working with Moche art has been to photograph objects in museums and private collections throughout the world . In the Moche Archive , located on the campus of the University of California in Los Angeles ( UCLA ) , we now have more than 135,000 photographs of such objects , all organized by subject matter . Photographs of objects depicting deer hunting , for example , are kept together , as are those of objects depicting architecture , warfare , and distinct ceremonies . This archive serves as an important resource for the study of Moche culture .

source: Seneca had prophesied , " The time will come when every land shall yield its hidden treasure ; when men no more shall unknown course measure , for round the world no ' farthest land ' shall be . source: This lack of clarity also distorts the view of policymakers about what is happening in the Middle East and so they daydream about democratic movements when the reality on the ground is more populist than democratic . The principal beneficiary of populism is more likely to be the Muslim Brotheihood than the local spokesman for Facebook . The credo of the Muslim Brotherhood is succinct and chilling : Allah is our goal ; the Prophet Muhammad is our leader ; the Qu ' ran is our constitution ; jihad is our way ; and death in the way of Allah is our promised end .

source: Yes , she 'd watched the new TV show Who Wants to Be a Millionaire -- has n't everyone ? -- and sure , it was good money , but she just could n't be bothered to call in . source: The only rule that governs the placement of dinner napkins on the table is : Keep them neat and attractive . They can sit in any number of places : to the left of the dinner plates with the forks resting either on top or alongside , blossoming out of the water goblets as if they were flowers , folded neatly and resting flat in the center of the dinner plates , or shaped in any number of artistic ways and , again , set in the center of the dinner plates .
domestication: 摆放餐巾的唯一规则就是：整齐美观。餐巾可以放在多个位置：可以放在餐盘左边，叉子要么放在上面，要么挨着放；也可以像花朵一样从水杯中绽放出来；还可以整齐折叠，平铺在餐盘中央；或是折成各种艺术形状，再次强调，放在餐盘中间。

source: Seeing the photo of Jamphel Yeshi setting himself on fire to fight for independence made me gasp and weep for those who live under oppression . The picture had such an impact that I felt like I 'd been hit with a blow to the solar plexus . What pain he must have experienced before dying of severe burns two days later . My parents fled China in 1949 and now live comfortably in the United States . I feel for people who resort to these desperate acts . What else can they do ?
domestication: 看到詹佩耶希自焚争取独立的照片，我倒吸一口凉气，为那些生活在压迫下的人们痛哭流涕。这张照片的冲击力太大了，我感觉就像被人打了一拳在胸口。他在两天后因严重烧伤去世前，该有多么痛苦啊。我的父母在1949年逃离中国，现在在美国过着舒适的生活。我能理解那些走投无路而采取极端行动的人。他们还能怎么做呢？

source: One fall day , after missing the group ride , I rolled out solo on a popular route , a relatively flat , hour-long spin . But instead , I found myself taking a left-hand turn away from the flats and toward a long , curvy ascent . It was a surprising departure ; I tend to amble along slowly when alone .
domestication: 那天是个秋天，我没赶上团队骑行，就独自一人沿着一条热门路线出发了，本以为这是一次相对平坦、约一小时的轻松骑行。没想到，我却拐了个弯，离开了平坦的道路，朝一条长而蜿蜒的上坡路骑去。这一变化让我有些意外，因为我一个人时通常骑得比较慢，悠哉游哉的。

source: The Ford research will supplement the finding of a 1985 study by the National Air and Space Museum ( NASM ) , which mounted a scholarly effort to find the best set of Wright Flyer plans . NASM concluded that while the drawings that Orville and Taylor created in 1939 were the most detailed , those based on an early Wright Flyer stored in England 's Kensington Science Museum were generally more accurate . Details Differ
domestication: 福特的研究将补充1985年国家航空航天博物馆（NASM）的一项研究结果。当时，NASM组织了一次学术努力，旨在找到最完整的莱特飞行器设计图。研究发现，尽管奥维尔和泰勒在1939年绘制的图纸最为详尽，但基于伦敦肯辛顿科学博物馆保存的早期莱特飞行器制作的图纸通常更为准确。细节上的差异很大。
foreignization: 福特的研究将补充国家航空航天博物馆（NASM）1985年研究的发现，该研究发起了一项学术努力，旨在找到最完整的一套莱特飞行器设计图。NASM得出结论，尽管奥维尔和泰勒在1939年绘制的设计图最为详细，但基于存放在英国肯辛顿科学博物馆的早期莱特飞行器的设计图通常更为准确。细节有所不同。

source: Uber has presented the court with information about a LiDAR design known as " Fuji , " whose four lenses distinguish it from the single-lens design supposedly detailed in the Waymo documents Levandowski is accused of stealing . But Waymo now says an earlier LiDAR sensor , designated by a code name redacted from the public filing , was designed by Levandowski and " infringes Waymo 's patents . " Moreover , Waymo claims that Uber has misled the court and plaintiff by concealing the device .
domestication: 优步向法院提交了关于一种名为“富士”的激光雷达设计的信息，这个设计有四个镜头，与莱万多夫斯基涉嫌窃取的韦摩文件中描述的单镜头设计大相径庭。但韦摩现在表示，一个更早的、代码名称被从公开文件中删去的激光雷达传感器，是由莱万多夫斯基设计的，而且“侵犯了韦摩的专利”。此外，韦摩还声称，优步在法庭上和对原告隐瞒了这一设备，误导了法官和对方。

source: When Fred Barnes published his article " Why California Does n't Matter " in the July 31 Weekly Standard , he seemed to be arguing a straightforward thesis : that California was no longer a significant influence on American politics because it was no longer a leading indicator of the political future . In the past California had decided presidential elections , as when its votes gave Richard Nixon his squeaker victory in 1968 , and pioneered voter rebellions , as when Proposition 13 sparked the tax revolt of the late 1970s . But that was all over now . The Golden State had become too eccentric politically , too remote from national trends , even too Democratic , to be a reliable weathervane in politics . It was the wave of the past .
domestication: 弗雷德·巴恩斯在7月31日的《标准周刊》上发表了《为什么加利福尼亚不再重要》一文，似乎在阐述一个直截了当的观点：加州不再是美国政治的重要影响因素，因为它不再是政治未来的风向标。过去，加州决定了总统选举的胜负，比如它那关键的一票帮助理查德·尼克松在1968年险胜；还率先掀起了选民抗争，比如13号提案引发了20世纪70年代末的税收反抗。但这些都成为往事了。现在的金州政治上越来越特立独行，与全国趋势渐行渐远，甚至过于偏向民主党，已经不能作为政治上的可靠风向标了。它成了昨日黄花。
foreignization: 当弗雷德·巴恩斯在7月31日的《标准周刊》上发表了他的文章《为什么加利福尼亚无关紧要》时，他似乎在论证一个直截了当的论点：加利福尼亚不再对美国政治产生重大影响，因为它不再是政治未来的领先指标。在过去，加利福尼亚曾决定总统选举的结果，例如其选票在1968年为理查德·尼克松赢得了险胜，还率先发起了选民抗争，例如13号提案引发了20世纪70年代末的税收反抗。但这一切都结束了。金州在政治上变得过于古怪，与国家趋势相距甚远，甚至过于民主党化，无法成为政治上的可靠风向标。它已成为过去的潮流。

source: A few feet away , taking this all in , sits Layne Staley , the troubled , enigmatic twenty-five-year-old lead singer of the Seattle hard-rock band Alice in Chains . He 's drunk off his ass , laughing it up , trying to get in on the action while enduring some very real pain himself . Staley , whose aching vocals and frequently haunting lyrics provide Alice with much of its dark , dangerous sound , has been in a cast since late September , when he ran over his foot riding a three-wheel all-terrain vehicle backstage at a show in Oklahoma City .
domestication: 不远处，莱恩·斯坦利正坐着，他是西雅图硬摇滚乐队“爱丽丝囚链”的主唱，二十五岁，内心充满挣扎，神秘莫测。他喝得酩酊大醉，笑得前俯后仰，想加入这场狂欢，自己却忍受着真实的痛苦。斯坦利那令人心碎的歌声和时常令人毛骨悚然的歌词，赋予了“爱丽丝囚链”那种阴郁而危险的独特风格。自九月下旬以来，他的脚就一直打着石膏，当时他在俄克拉荷马城的一场演出后台，骑着三轮全地形车时不慎碾过了自己的脚。
foreignization: 几英尺外，正在观察这一切的是莱恩·斯特利，这位有问题的、神秘的二十五岁的西雅图硬摇滚乐队“爱丽丝囚徒”的主唱。他喝得酩酊大醉，笑得很开心，试图参与其中，同时自己也在承受着相当真实的痛苦。斯特利那令人伤感的歌声和经常带有阴郁色彩的歌词为“爱丽丝囚徒”提供了大部分黑暗、危险的声音。自9月下旬以来，他就一直打着石膏，当时他在俄克拉荷马城的一场演出后台骑三轮全地形车时辗过了自己的脚。

source: Larger companies began paying ­ serious attention to their women 's products in the late 1990s . Like Terry , product managers at Trek , Specialized , and other big companies culled anatomical data from many sources . Generally , those manufacturers came to conclusions similar to ­ Terry 's . Henderson , at Trek , theorized that many women tend to roll their hips back to relieve soft-tissue pressure from the saddle , which causes them to arch their backs , and , effectively , need to reach farther to the handlebar .
domestication: 到了20世纪90年代末，大公司开始认真关注女性产品了。就像特里一样，Trek、Specialized等大公司的产品经理们从各种渠道搜集了人体数据。总的来说，这些制造商得出的结论和特里差不多。Trek的亨德森认为，许多女性为了缓解坐垫对软组织的压力，往往会向后倾斜骨盆，这导致她们背部拱起，实际上就得把手伸得更远才能够到车把。
foreignization: 大型公司开始在20世纪90年代末认真关注她们的女性产品。像特里一样，Trek、Specialized和其他大公司的产品经理们从多个来源收集了解剖学数据。通常，这些制造商得出了与特里相似的结论。Trek的亨德森理论认为，许多女性倾向于向后滚动臀部以缓解鞍座对软组织的压力，这导致她们拱起背部，并且实际上需要伸展得更远才能触及把手。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Larger companies began paying ­ serious attention to their women 's products in the late 1990s . Like Terry , product managers at Trek , Specialized , and other big companies culled anatomical data from many sources . Generally , those manufacturers came to conclusions similar to ­ Terry 's . Henderson , at Trek , theorized that many women tend to roll their hips back to relieve soft-tissue pressure from the saddle , which causes them to arch their backs , and , effectively , need to reach farther to the handlebar .

source: When he created a video showing the Apollo 17 landing site , Wright took an approach that would focus on highlighting the path of the astronauts . The sight on the moon is smaller than a pixel , and zooming into the sight and showing the rover tracks all fuel the ultimate goal of telling the story of the images captured by LRO .
domestication: 当莱特制作阿波罗17号着陆点的视频时，他采用了突出宇航员行走路径的方法。月球上的那个地点小得连一个像素都不到，但放大后能清晰看到月球车留下的痕迹，这一切都是为了讲述LRO拍摄到的图像背后的故事。
foreignization: 当他创建一个展示阿波罗17号着陆点的视频时，赖特采取了一种方法，重点突出宇航员的路径。月球上的景象比一个像素还要小，放大景象并显示漫游车的轨迹都有助于最终目标，即讲述由LRO捕获的图像的故事。

source: Maybe it was the bike . Giant 's TCR Advanced W is part of the company 's performance line . A lightweight carbon frame , responsive wheels , and SRAM 's impressive Force components combine for a 15-pound package that proved fast and fun on a variety of rides . The handling is sensitive and quick -- a sudden sneeze threw me off my line , but the TCR W still let me recover quickly . The bike climbs gamely , though with a steady , regular feel instead of lots of snap .
domestication: 可能是这辆自行车的缘故吧。捷安特的TCR Advanced W是他们高性能系列中的一员。轻量化的碳纤维车架、灵敏的轮组再加上SRAM出色的Force组件，组合成了一台仅15磅重的座驾，在各种骑行中都显得既快速又好玩。操控非常灵敏和迅速——有一次突然打了个喷嚏，差点偏离了路线，但TCR W还是让我迅速稳住了。爬坡时表现得很积极，虽然不是那么爆发力十足，但步伐稳定而有力。
foreignization: 也许是这辆自行车。捷安特的TCR Advanced W是公司性能系列的一部分。轻量化的碳纤维车架、反应灵敏的轮组和SRAM出色的Force组件结合在一起，构成了一个15磅重的组合，在各种骑行中证明了它的快速和乐趣。操控灵敏且迅速——一次突然的打喷嚏让我偏离了路线，但TCR W仍然让我能够迅速恢复。这辆车爬坡时表现勇敢，尽管感觉稳定而规律，而不是有很多爆发力。

source: Chung : The single biggest reason is smartphones . They give you the ability to take a photo and give it to someone . They 're like books where you can put your idea in one and give to someone . To be able to send these images and information across to someone , we did n't have any mechanism to do that . But now we have the technology to consume them .
domestication: 钟：最主要的原因就是智能手机。它们让你能拍张照片就发给别人。这就像一本书，你可以把自己的想法写进去，然后送给别人。以前我们没有这样的手段来传递图像和信息，但现在我们有了这样的技术，可以随时随地分享和接收这些内容。
foreignization: 钟：最重要的一个原因是智能手机。它们让你有能力拍下照片并传给别人。它们就像书籍，你可以将自己的想法放入其中然后传递给他人。能够将这些图像和信息发送给他人，我们过去没有任何机制可以做到这一点。但现在我们有了消费这些内容的技术。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Chung : The single biggest reason is smartphones . They give you the ability to take a photo and give it to someone . They 're like books where you can put your idea in one and give to someone . To be able to send these images and information across to someone , we did n't have any mechanism to do that . But now we have the technology to consume them .
钟：最主要的原因就是智能手机。它们让你能拍张照片就发给别人。这就像一本书，你可以把自己的想法写进去，然后送给别人。以前我们没有这样的手段来传递图像和信息，但现在我们有了这样的技术，可以随时随地分享和接收这些内容。
